spanish: no me extraña que fuese un astrónomo estadounidense el que descubrió al baby planeta Plutón
english: it doesnt surprise me that it was an American astronomer who discovered the baby planet Pluto
explanation: Imperfect subjunctive (fuese) triggered by "no me extraña que" expressing past subjunctive in a relative clause

spanish: está compuesto principalmente de hielo y roca
english: it is composed mainly of ice and rock
explanation: Passive construction with estar + past participle (compuesto) describing composition

spanish: el pánico que estarán sintiendo la gente en el planeta tierra
english: the panic that the people on planet Earth must be feeling
explanation: Future progressive (estarán sintiendo) combining future tense of estar with gerund to describe ongoing future action
